description_long: This is a detached suburban house with a light-colored exterior, surrounded by a small yard and several trees. The house features a prominent gable roof with multiple intersecting sections, and a driveway leading to an attached garage at the front. The property is bordered by a low fence on one side and is adjacent to a paved street. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some larger panes facing the front and smaller ones on the sides. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessible via a short walkway, and is partially sheltered by a small overhang. Landscaping includes shrubs and trees, providing a sense of privacy and greenery around the home.
description: A light-colored suburban house with a gable roof, attached garage, and landscaped yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, attached garage, main entryway, and most of the landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, side yard, and the fence bordering the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, more trees, and the back side of the roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage's side, additional yard space, and the street running alongside.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small overhang, short walkway, and steps leading from the driveway; no prominent porch or columns.
